title: PHP QA Lead - Remote
description: Job Description Job Title: PHP Quality Assurance Lead Job Type: Contract Location: Remote About This Role In this hourly, remote contractor role, you will work as a PHP Quality Assurance Lead to oversee quality, consistency, and trainer performance across PHP AI training projects. You will review AI-generated PHP code and trainer/QA work, evaluate output quality against project guidelines, provide precise written feedback, and ensure contributors follow expected quality standards. You will assess work for code correctness, runtime behavior, framework awareness, debugging accuracy, readability, maintainability, performance, security, test coverage, formatting, instruction-following, and rubric adherence. This role requires strong PHP expertise, English communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage quality workflows across remote technical teams. This role is a fast-growing AI Data Services company delivering training data for many of the world’s largest AI companies and foundation-model labs. Your PHP quality leadership will help ensure PHP training data is accurate, executable, secure, clearly explained, and aligned with client expectations. Selection process involves an AI interview, a domain-specific task, and an interview with a recruiter. Important: There is no immediate project for this role; however, if qualified, you will be among the first experts we reach out to when relevant opportunities arise. This will also provide you with access to future projects available through our expert network. Your Profile Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT, or equivalent professional experience. Strong grasp of English to follow guidelines and provide clear technical feedback. 3+ years of professional PHP development, backend engineering, code review, QA, mentoring, or related workflows. Strong understanding of PHP 8+, OOP, namespaces, Composer, autoloading, arrays, exceptions, type declarations, sessions, HTTP, REST APIs, database access, and error handling. Ability to evaluate PHP content and identify issues such as non-executable code, insecure SQL handling, weak validation, flawed logic, outdated syntax, hallucinated APIs, or incomplete explanations. Familiarity with Laravel, Symfony, PHPUnit, Pest, MySQL/PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, GitHub, CI/CD, static analysis tools, and PSR standards is preferred. Experience leading or supporting remote teams of trainers, annotators, reviewers, engineers, or QAs is strongly preferred. Comfortable with Discord, Google Sheets, Google Docs, trackers, dashboards, GitHub, and PM systems. Highly organized and able to maintain documentation, style guides, trackers, FAQs, calibration tasks, and honeypots. Experience with AI training, LLM evaluation, code QA, or rubric-based review is a strong plus. Key Responsibilities Spot-check PHP items and provide ongoing feedback through DMs. Review AI-generated PHP code, backend snippets, debugging responses, API examples, database logic, and tests. Update trainers/QAs on Discord about guideline changes and PHP-specific quality standards. Answer questions around PHP syntax, frameworks, runtime behavior, security, testing, and rubric interpretation. Activate inactive contributors through DMs and follow-up tracking. Create and maintain PHP documentation, style guides, examples, trackers, FAQs, honeypots, and onboarding materials. Run onboarding/training calls for PHP trainers and QAs. Flag insecure, outdated, misleading, or non-production-ready PHP recommendations. Identify recurring quality gaps and improve QA processes.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: 🚀 Quick Apply: Click here to apply directly for this position. About Us We are a trusted recruitment partner working with multiple fast-growing startups, scale-ups, and enterprise technology companies across Europe and international markets. For upcoming and active projects, we are looking for talented Full Stack Developers who want to build scalable digital products, modern platforms, and high-impact software systems used by thousands—and in some cases millions—of users worldwide. Selected candidates may be matched with one or more partner companies based on technical background, experience, and career goals. Tasks What You’ll Work On Application Development: Design, develop, and maintain modern full-stack applications. Backend & APIs: Build scalable backend services, robust APIs, and seamless integrations. Frontend UX: Develop highly responsive, intuitive, and user-friendly frontend experiences. Architecture: Work on microservice-based, distributed architectures and integrate third-party platforms, cloud services, and external APIs. DevOps & Cloud: Contribute to automation, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native environments. Optimization: Optimize applications for maximum scalability, reliability, security, and performance. Collaboration: Partner closely with Product, Design, DevOps, Data, and Business teams while participating in code reviews, technical discussions, and architectural decisions. Innovation: Work on both greenfield products and existing production systems, including AI-enabled, data-driven, or automation-focused platforms where applicable. Requirements What We’re Looking For Experience: 3+ years of professional software development experience (Senior opportunities are also available). Frontend Skills: Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React, Next.js, Angular , or similar. Backend Skills: Experience with backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, PHP , or similar, alongside solid backend engineering fundamentals. System Design: Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices, and scalable system design. Data & Tools: Experience with SQL and/or NoSQL databases, Git, and collaborative development workflows. Cloud & Infrastructure: Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, cloud platforms, and CI/CD workflows. Security: Solid understanding of authentication and authorization concepts (JWT, OAuth, etc.). Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving, debugging, and analytical thinking skills. Good communication skills with the ability to work in cross-functional, international teams and an ownership mindset. Nice to Have: Experience with cloud providers ( AWS, Azure, or GCP ). Exposure to event-driven systems and tools such as Kafka or RabbitMQ . Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools. Experience with AI/LLM integrations , automation systems, or agent-based workflows. Experience in domains such as Fintech, E-commerce, SaaS, Data Platforms, or Enterprise systems. Knowledge of testing practices, performance optimization, and software craftsmanship principles. Benefits What You Can Expect Flexibility: Remote, hybrid, and on-site opportunities depending on the specific project. Impact: Opportunities to work with modern, high-impact technology teams and scale modern architectures. Culture: International, collaborative engineering environments within fast-moving teams that value a strong ownership culture. Growth: Continuous career growth opportunities across different industries, products, and emerging technologies. Compensation: Competitive compensation packages tailored to your experience and project scope. How to Apply If you’re passionate about building reliable, scalable, and modern software systems— click here to submit your application . We’d love to hear from you!

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
description: Role: Senior Backend Engineer (Python) Location: On-site Job Type: Contract Payout: $40 - $120/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Senior Backend Engineer (Python) to work on a contract basis. The role involves designing and implementing scalable backend systems to support high-traffic applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver robust solutions in a fast-paced environment. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and maintain backend services using Python and related frameworks. • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for large-scale applications. • Implement and maintain APIs, databases, and microservices architecture. • Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code following best practices. • Troubleshoot and resolve issues in production environments to ensure uptime. Required Skills & Qualifications: • 5+ years of professional experience in backend development with Python. • Proficiency in Python frameworks such as Django, Flask, or FastAPI. • Experience with RESTful API design and integration with frontend systems. • Strong understanding of databases (SQL and NoSQL) and query optimization. • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). • Knowledge of version control systems, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing. • Experience with caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached) and message brokers (RabbitMQ, Kafka). • Ability to work in an Agile/Scrum environment and manage multiple priorities. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development industry, contributing to the development of cutting-edge backend systems that power high-demand platforms. The project involves building scalable solutions to support growing user traffic and business needs. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: ABOUT Jotform Jotform is a San Francisco-based SaaS company with more than 35 million users worldwide. We are thriving and growing, and we’ve never needed outside funding. That’s because we like keeping things agile, independent and fun. Jotform believes everyone should be able to create their own online forms. Our 10,000+ ready-made form templates, 100+ integrations and more than 380 widgets have made us one of the most popular online form builders for organizations of all sizes — from small businesses to enterprises. Since our inception in 2006, our mission has been to help users create, manage and share online forms and receive responses in the easiest way possible. ABOUT THE ROLE Jotform is seeking a Senior Backend Developer in our Ankara office, located at a relaxed fun environment in Hacettepe University Teknokent. As a rapidly growing company we are hiring for similar positions continuously and once an opportunity matches with your qualifications, we will contact you immediately. Here’s what you will be doing: Work closely with product management, front end developers, devOps and designers Design, build and deploy new features for Jotform Deliver solutions in a continuous integration flow to production having 35 million users Review and iterate architecture to ensure scale along with the growth Education & Work Experience & Technical Requirements: BS Degree in Computer Science/Engineering or related technical field or equivalent practical experience Experience in building web applications Proficiency in PHP Familiarity with Distributed Systems programming Experience in SaaS and high traffic applications are highly preferred Understanding of HTML, CSS, Javascript, React and other web technologies Solid understanding of OOP principles Working experience with CI/CD and related tools like Git and Jenkins Ability to write high-performance, maintainable and reusable code Excellent command of English Personal Specifications/Skills: Demonstrated ability to work independently with minimal supervision A passion to learn and keep up with the latest technologies Jotform PERKS High growth-paced environment with collaborative and unique team culture Generous market competitive total compensation package Health Insurance Professional Growth & Career Opportunities: We support your personal and professional development with educational materials and expenses & relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends & online courses or coaching - and support you pursuing ones that you are passionate about! Challenging projects, regular feedback, healthy competition Fun & Relax working environment: When we’re in the office; music, jeans and t-shirts are the norm & kitchens stocked with healthy & tasty snacks & drinks OUR PROCESS We’ll review your application along with all the others we receive and pick the top profiles for a screening call. In many cases due to time constraints and our candidate volume, only the short-listed candidates are contacted but we do consider each application carefully. If you have been selected as a short-listed candidate, we will contact you for a short screening call to get to know you better. If you don’t get a call, please don’t be disappointed! We receive many applications for each role and have to prioritize who we speak to. Thank you for taking the time to apply for a position at Jotform! Jotform is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. https://www.jotform.com/job-applicant-privacy/

title: Senior Backend Developer
description: About Us Founded in 2000, Akakçe is Turkey’s leading price comparison platform, helping over 40 million users find the best deals every month. Our commitment to cutting-edge technology, data-driven insights, and continuous innovation makes us a key player in the e-commerce ecosystem. About the Role At Akakçe, we operate web and mobile platforms used by millions of users. We are looking for Senior Backend Engineers who can design, build, improve, and operate reliable systems that directly affect user experience and business outcomes. This role is for engineers who enjoy solving complex backend problems, improving existing systems, and building simple, scalable solutions. Technology experience is important, but we care more about engineering judgment, ownership, debugging ability, and problem-solving depth. What You Will Do Understand product and business problems, then design practical technical solutions. Build and improve backend services, APIs, data flows, and integrations. Work on systems that must perform reliably under high user traffic. Improve performance, scalability, maintainability, and observability of existing systems. Investigate production issues, identify root causes, and implement long-term fixes. Collaborate with product, frontend, mobile, data, QA, and infrastructure teams. Contribute to technical design discussions and code reviews. Write clean, testable, maintainable code. Reduce unnecessary complexity in existing systems. Take ownership of features and systems beyond initial development. What We Look For Strong software engineering fundamentals. Ability to reason about system design, data modeling, APIs, performance, and failure cases. Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills. Experience building production backend systems. Good understanding of relational databases and query behavior. Ability to design maintainable code and refactor existing code safely. Awareness of testing, monitoring, logging, deployment, and operational concerns. Clear communication and strong collaboration skills. Ability to learn new technologies when needed. Ownership mindset and result-oriented attitude. Current Technologies We Use Experience with these technologies is useful, but they are not the only way to show engineering strength: .NET / .NET Core MSSQL or other relational databases Queueing systems such as RabbitMQ Python in some areas CI/CD pipelines High-traffic web systems. Nice to Have Experience with high-load platforms. Experience with distributed systems, caching, queues, background jobs, and performance optimization. Experience improving legacy systems without unnecessary rewrites. Experience with automated testing and clean architecture practices. "Your personal data gathered in your application to this job advertisement will be processed in automated systems to manage job application procedures by Akakçe Bilgi Teknolojileri Sanayi ve Ticaret A. Ş. (“Akakçe”) according to the Law No. 6698 on the Protection of Personal Data (“KVKK”) and related regulations."

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Senior Backend Software Developer

title: Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote)
description: Role : Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) (Remote) Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type : Full-Time Payout : $230K - $280K/yr Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Fullstack Developer (React/Node.js) - US to work on a full-time basis. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Technology, Information and Internet industry, contributing to the development of mission-critical applications. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Full Stack Developer
description: 🚀 Quick Apply: Click here to apply directly for this position. About Us We are a trusted recruitment partner working with multiple fast-growing startups, scale-ups, and enterprise technology companies across Europe and international markets. For upcoming and active projects, we are looking for talented Full Stack Developers who want to build scalable digital products, modern platforms, and high-impact software systems used by thousands—and in some cases millions—of users worldwide. Selected candidates may be matched with one or more partner companies based on technical background, experience, and career goals. Tasks What You’ll Work On Application Development: Design, develop, and maintain modern full-stack applications. Backend & APIs: Build scalable backend services, robust APIs, and seamless integrations. Frontend UX: Develop highly responsive, intuitive, and user-friendly frontend experiences. Architecture: Work on microservice-based, distributed architectures and integrate third-party platforms, cloud services, and external APIs. DevOps & Cloud: Contribute to automation, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native environments. Optimization: Optimize applications for maximum scalability, reliability, security, and performance. Collaboration: Partner closely with Product, Design, DevOps, Data, and Business teams while participating in code reviews, technical discussions, and architectural decisions. Innovation: Work on both greenfield products and existing production systems, including AI-enabled, data-driven, or automation-focused platforms where applicable. Requirements What We’re Looking For Experience: 3+ years of professional software development experience (Senior opportunities are also available). Frontend Skills: Experience with modern frontend frameworks such as React, Next.js, Angular , or similar. Backend Skills: Experience with backend technologies such as Node.js, Python, Java, .NET, PHP , or similar, alongside solid backend engineering fundamentals. System Design: Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, microservices, and scalable system design. Data & Tools: Experience with SQL and/or NoSQL databases, Git, and collaborative development workflows. Cloud & Infrastructure: Familiarity with Docker, Kubernetes, cloud platforms, and CI/CD workflows. Security: Solid understanding of authentication and authorization concepts (JWT, OAuth, etc.). Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving, debugging, and analytical thinking skills. Good communication skills with the ability to work in cross-functional, international teams and an ownership mindset. Nice to Have: Experience with cloud providers ( AWS, Azure, or GCP ). Exposure to event-driven systems and tools such as Kafka or RabbitMQ . Familiarity with monitoring and observability tools. Experience with AI/LLM integrations , automation systems, or agent-based workflows. Experience in domains such as Fintech, E-commerce, SaaS, Data Platforms, or Enterprise systems. Knowledge of testing practices, performance optimization, and software craftsmanship principles. Benefits What You Can Expect Flexibility: Remote, hybrid, and on-site opportunities depending on the specific project. Impact: Opportunities to work with modern, high-impact technology teams and scale modern architectures. Culture: International, collaborative engineering environments within fast-moving teams that value a strong ownership culture. Growth: Continuous career growth opportunities across different industries, products, and emerging technologies. Compensation: Competitive compensation packages tailored to your experience and project scope. How to Apply If you’re passionate about building reliable, scalable, and modern software systems— click here to submit your application . We’d love to hear from you!
